summary: Defensive trading features (pre-flight balance check, inventory drift monitor, Jupiter retry + auto-reverse) tested end-to-end. 15/15 pytest cases passed (settings persistence, /api/inventory-baseline/reset, /api/inventory-drift, _compute_drift math, _preflight_balance_check across 5 scenarios, drift+partial alert formatters, Jupiter retry source-code inspection). Frontend Settings page: all 3 new data-testids render, Save Configuration persists drift_alert_pct + auto_reverse_on_partial, Reset Inventory Baseline triggers window.confirm and shows success toast.

design_issues.screen: Settings · Risk Caps · Drift Alert Threshold input
issues: input-drift-alert-pct uses step="0.5" which makes intermediate values like 8.25 fail HTML5 validation (browser blocks submission with 'two nearest valid values are 8 and 8.5'). If finer granularity is desired, lower step (e.g. 0.1) or remove. Currently functional with 0.5 steps.

action_items: Optional: relax drift_alert_pct input step from 0.5 to 0.1 if users need fractional control beyond half-percent increments.
critical_code_review_comments: engine.execute_trade_live retry loop is correct: 3 attempts with backoffs [0.0, 2.0, 5.0]; jupiter_attempts counter increments before each attempt; auto-reverse path is gated on settings.auto_reverse_on_partial AND executed_qty present; on reverse failure the status falls back to 'partial' with combined error message — good defensive design.

_preflight_balance_check fail-open behavior (returns ok=True, 'preflight-skipped' when both balance dicts are empty) preserves backwards compatibility but means a transient Binance/Phantom API outage will NOT block trades. Consider adding a settings flag (e.g. require_preflight=False default) to opt into strict mode.

inventory_drift_task sleeps 300s BEFORE first run — first drift check happens 5 min after server start. Acceptable but consider running once after startup so users see immediate drift on /api/inventory-drift after baseline reset.

auto_exec_task uses last_fired throttle of 30s per coin, while opportunity_logger throttles at 30s too — consistent. Note that auto_exec preflight skip is silently logged (continue) without persisting the skip reason — operators may want a 'preflight_skips' counter for visibility.
format_partial_trade_alert_msg correctly truncates error to 300 chars; status string is uppercased; reversed_cex emoji branches verified.
test_credentials: N/A — all tests run in paper mode without real API keys.
seed_data_creation: Tests temporarily set drift_alert_pct=7.5 / 8.5 then revert to 5.0 and auto_reverse_on_partial=False. No persistent test data created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Defensive trading hardening (iteration 7) is fully verified. The Jupiter retry loop was validated via source inspection (cannot exercise live without keys, by design). Pre-flight check tested in 5 scenarios via monkeypatch of _fetch_binance_balances/_fetch_phantom_balances. All previous iteration suites (test_bot_toggle_and_balance.py, test_daily_summary_and_csv.py, test_opp_log_and_backtest.py, test_p1p2_enhancements.py) are still present and were not re-run this iteration — re-run them if regression coverage is needed.
